classObjective: Find the distance from a point to a line in the coordinate plane.
workedExamples: 12-10, Example 1 — Find the Distance from a Point to a Line (Slanted Lines)
12-10, Example 2 — Find the Distance from a Point to a Horizontal or Vertical Line
warmUp: How would you find the distance from point (3, 4) to the x-axis?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: perpendicular distance; slope of perpendicular; intersection method; horizontal/vertical line special cases
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice finding distances from points to lines using perpendicular approach
independentPractice: Practice problems finding distances from points to lines in the coordinate plane
assessment: Exit ticket: find the distance from the point (3, 4) to the line y = 2x + 1
capReflection: Why is the perpendicular distance from a point to a line the shortest distance?
